  "watchlist_notes": "BAJAJ-AUTO: Strong Q4 beat + ₹5,633Cr buyback at ₹12,000 (~14% premium). Currently in 5-session re-entry cooldown from Day-10 exit (May 4) — do NOT re-enter yet, cooldown ends ~May 11. Will reassess then. M&M: Already-published Q4 beat now widely digested; chasing +5.7% intraday move post-news risky. SRF: NIL dividend signal weakened — already have NAVINFLUOR for chemicals exposure (cluster discipline). LUPIN/AUROPHARMA/DABUR: All have Q4 binary today — skip per binary-event rule. HDFCBANK: Banking-cluster exposure already via PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL; pass. HFCL: Pending OPEN order from earlier — leave to fill or expire; no second entry.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book fully deployed (~₹4.6L across 11 names) — no fresh capacity for new entries today. Tape is strongly bullish across IT/Pharma/Auto/CapGoods/Chemicals/Financials, all of which we have exposure to. Discipline today is holding through with appropriate SLs; do NOT chase additional names into a +1-2% session. Sector cluster exposure: Financial Services (PNBHOUSING + ABCAPITAL + CAMS) ~25% — at the watch zone; no more financials. Capital Goods (HAL + TITAGARH + GRSE) ~25% — also at watch zone, no more defense/capgoods. HFCL pending order from prior session is the only item to monitor; if not filled by EOD I'll re-evaluate. Cumulative experiment P&L -53.72% is a deep drawdown — present discipline (entry-day breakeven SLs, 100% deployment with quality names) is the right posture; let winners run, don't churn."
